properties.displayName: Azure Health Data Services workspace should disable public network access
properties.description: Disabling public network access improves security by ensuring that the Azure Health Data Services workspace (Microsoft.HealthcareApis/workspaces) is not exposed on the public internet and can only be reached from a private endpoint. Microsoft's built-in policy only audits for an approved private endpoint connection; this custom definition denies on the publicNetworkAccess field for stronger enforcement. Child FHIR and DICOM services inherit the workspace's connectivity unless they explicitly override it. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/healthcareapisprivatelink.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
